attempts.text:
Eyes like painted skies,
Mocha, azure, emerald,
Beauty in each gaze.
Happy #NationalDifferentColoredEyesDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Eyes of every hue,
Twinkling like stars at dusk,
Unity in shades.
Happy #NationalDifferentColoredEyesDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Eyes of every hue,
Sparkling like morning dew,
Together, we shine.
Happy #NationalDifferentColoredEyesDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Eyes like painted skies,
Hues of azure and green,
A world bright with love.
Happy #NationalDifferentColoredEyesDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Eyes of every hue,
Sparkling like morning dew,
Celebrate the view.
Happy #NationalDifferentColoredEyesDay from @ClamBakeSanta
